rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Drywall Cut-Out Tool (Tool Only)
rows.description: Get fast, clean cuts on a variety of wall paneling with the 20V MAX* Drywall Cut-Out Tool featuring a 26,000 rpm brushless motor. It's compact and lightweight design makes it the most compact drywall cut-out tool in its class**. Designed with a forward-positioned on-off button and tool-free bit change system, this product offers versatility for a wide range of jobs. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 26,000 RPM brushless motor delivers fast and consistent cutting performance
Brushless motor for efficient performance and runtime
Forward-positioned on-off button designed for ease-of-use
additional_features: Tool-free bit change enables fast bit changes without the need for a wrench.
LED light helps to illuminate dark work surfaces for accurate cutting
Compact size and weight designed to reduce fatique during periods of extended use.
Depth guide designed for consistent cutting depth and consistent engagement with cutting edge of bit
Tool Connect CHIP READY: Chip pocket accepts Tool Connect Chip DCE042 and connects with Tool Connect Site Manager app for easy asset management on the jobsite. (DCE042 sold separately)
includes: (1) DCE555 20V MAX* XR Brushless Drywall Cut-Out Tool

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 3 in. Brushless Cut-Off Tool (Tool Only)
rows.description: Cut a wide range of materials with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless 3 in. Cut-Off Tool. With a no-load speed of 20,000 rpm, this durable tool is designed for metal, tile, stone, plastic, and drywall/fiber cement. Offering quick wheel changes and both forward and reverse capability, this tool is delivers optimized performance depending on the application. The included dust shroud with adjustable shoe and AirLock connection allows for convenient attachment to DEWALT extractors, while the integrated LED lets you work in dark spaces. As a part of the 20V MAX* system, this TOOL CONNECT Chip-Ready product can be seamlessly intergraded into your current inventory. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 20,000 RPM motor with 7/8 in. max depth of cut
Power Through Difficult Applications - With brushless motor and 550 MWO**
Cut A Wide Range Of Materials - Includes Bonded Abrasive Wheel, Diamond† Multi-Material Wheel, and Diamond† Tile Wheel (This blade uses manufactured diamonds engineered for cutting)
additional_features: Compatible With Accessories - Includes an adaptor ring to be placed over 3/8 in. arbor, allowing use of 3 in. wheels that require a 7/16 in. arbor
Connect To Extractors - Includes a removable dust shroud with an AirLock connection, enabling the unit to be connected to a DEWALT extractor (sold separately)
TOOL CONNECT Chip Ready - Chip pocket accepts TOOL CONNECT Chip DCE042 (sold separately) and connects with Site Manager app for easy asset management on the jobsite
Conveniently Set Desired Depth - Dust shroud features tool-free depth adjustment with mm and inch markings
Illuminate Dark Work Areas - With bright LED
Quickly Adjsut Spark Direction - When cutting metal with tool-free adjustable guard
includes: (1) DCS438 20V MAX* XR Brushless cordless 3 in. Cut-Off Tool
(1) Removable Dust Shroud With Adjustable Shoe and Airlock Connection
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
† This blade uses manufactured diamonds engineered for cutting

rows.title: 20V MAX* Drywall Cut Out Tool (Tool Only)
rows.description: Cut through drywall fast with the 20V MAX* Drywall Cut Out Tool. A 26,000 rpm motor and tool-free bit changing capability lets you tackle drywall jobs with ease. A dust-sealed switch protects against dust ingestion for long tool life. Compatible with 20V MAX* batteries and chargers, this cordless product can be added to your existing lineup. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 26,000 RPM motor delivers fast cutting in drywall, acoustical ceiling tiles, plywood, etc.
Tool-free for fast and easy bit changing without a wrench
Dust-sealed switch protects against dust ingestion for longer tool life
additional_features: Bright LED light illuminates dark work surfaces for accurate cutting
applications: Cutting holes in drywall for recessed lighting, electrical boxes or outlets
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: Cut Out Tool
rows.description: Ideal for outlet cuts in drywall, the DW660 Cut Out Tool features a 5 amp motor that delivers up to 30,000 rpm. Designed with a slim design, durable construction, and a bump switch provides ease-of-use on tough jobs.
features: Tool-free bit change for fast and easy bit changing without a wrench
Turn-on/Bump-off switch allows user to easily shut tool off
5.0 amp, 30,000 rpm motor provides more cutting power
additional_features: Slim body design and ergonomic for less fatigue over prolonged use
Dust-Sealed Switch protects against dust ingestion for longer switch life
applications: Cutting holes in drywall for recessed lighting, electrical boxes or outlets
Cutting holes in Hardiplank, cement board
Cutting holes in plywood or cabinets for installation
Cutting holes in acoustical ceiling tile for sprinkler systems and recessed lighting
Cutting holes in light-gauge/non-ferrous metals, HVAC
